```dockerfile
# Tue, 16 Jul 2024 22:56:42 GMT
COPY /rootfs/ / # buildkit
# Tue, 16 Jul 2024 22:56:42 GMT
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
# Tue, 16 Jul 2024 22:56:42 GMT
ARG version=11.0.24.8-1
# Tue, 16 Jul 2024 22:56:42 GMT
